rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees involving ports
Stateful equations in AGREE should use initialized temporal recurrence patterns
AGREE guarantees must relate visible outputs to visible inputs without relying on implementation-only subcomponent paths
generic_rules: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for complex conditional expressions
Place component type annexes in the appropriate scope for assumptions and guarantees
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are visible or properly declared in the same annex
Validate that helper declarations match the types of the expressions they define
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Branching logic in AGREE uses nested if ... then ... else patterns
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations: 0.0 -> pre(t) + step
Constants and equations in AGREE must declare valid scalar types: int, real, bool
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not mix invalid scalar type names like 'integer' or 'boolean' in AGREE declarations
Do not write guarantees that depend on implementation-only paths in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
